title: Enjoy Vanilla More
description: Modpack with some optimize and user friendly mods
body:
## Welcome to the Enjoy Vanilla More Modpack for Minecraft!

### Experience
Experience the thrill of playing Minecraft with your friends and immerse yourself in every moment of the game with this incredible Modpack.

### *Enjoy*
This modpack offers a unique blend of fixes and enhancements that will elevate your gaming session without altering the core concept of Minecraft. It allows you to fully immerse yourself in the classic gameplay mechanics while enjoying improvements and unique features added by the modpack.

### Play together
Feel the adrenaline rush as you embark on exciting adventures in the depths of dungeons or treacherous jungles. Encounter new creatures, biomes, and resources that breathe new life into your game. Embark on a journey through the generated world, reveling in the diversity and beauty of nature unfolding before you.

### Create
Share your adventures with friends as you join forces in expeditions or collaborate on building massive joint projects. Play in cooperative mode, sharing resources, interacting, and creating together. The Modpack enables you to fully enjoy the social aspect of Minecraft and strengthen your bonds with your friends.

### Realize your dreams
Don't forget to thrive and evolve in your virtual world. Create incredible structures, build farms and automated systems, explore new recipes and crafts to expand your capabilities. Unleash your creative spirit by crafting stunning architectural masterpieces and unique landscapes.

### *Vanilla*
This Modpack is designed to ensure that every moment of your gameplay brings you joy. It preserves the original spirit of Minecraft while enhancing it with improvements that allow you to fully immerse yourself in the gaming world. Play with friends and experience the true essence of Minecraft, where every moment is a source of excitement and enjoyment.

### Balance
Step into the world of the meticulously crafted Modpack, where balance is key and every element has been carefully fine-tuned to create an exceptional gameplay experience. This modpack strikes the perfect equilibrium by including everything you need while eliminating any unnecessary clutter.

### *More*
Modpack represents the epitome of a finely tuned Minecraft experience. It combines essential elements, eliminates unnecessary clutter, and delivers a perfectly balanced adventure. Immerse yourself in the world of Minecraft, where every aspect has been carefully considered to provide you with an ideal gameplay experience that is both familiar and exciting.

### Enjoy Vanilla More 
This name means to derive greater enjoyment from the vanilla experience. This name implies that this modpack is designed to enhance the pleasure of playing vanilla Minecraft. It aims to improve and enrich the vanilla experience without adding new content, making the game more engaging, interesting, and enjoyable. This modpack allows you to fully immerse yourself in all aspects and mechanics of the original game, enhancing them and creating a more pleasant and satisfying gameplay experience.

## Idea

This modpack contains all the mods that can help you enjoy the game with good FPS and a pleasant environment

## Creation

Modpack with some optimize and user friendly mods based on [fabulously optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)
